action_set_definitions.name: get_supplier_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metadata and performance metrics for a specific supplier by their unique ID.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier for the supplier facility (e.g., 'GFT-PK-001-A').

action_set_definitions.name: update_supplier_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Updates specific performance metrics (Quality, Cost, Delivery) or compliance data (NCI counts) for a target supplier.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier for the supplier facility.

updates.description: The key-value pairs of metrics to update.

action_set_definitions.name: get_threshold_configs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the global scoring thresholds required to reach specific tiers (e.g., Gold, Platinum).

action_set_definitions.name: update_global_weights
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the global system weights used to calculate the aggregate score from individual metrics.

config_name.description: A descriptive label for the new weight configuration.

action_set_definitions.name: create_evaluation_log
action_set_definitions.description: Records a new entry in the chronological evaluation logs for auditing and certification tracking.

supplier_id.description: The ID of the supplier associated with the event.

event_description.description: A detailed description of the change or victory being recorded.

state_description.suppliers: A dictionary where keys are supplier IDs and values are objects containing supplier metadata, category, and current raw performance metrics (quality, cost, delivery).
state_description.scoring_weights: The current weight configuration used to calculate the final aggregate score from raw metrics.
state_description.evaluation_logs: A chronological record of evaluation events, including timestamps and the user/agent responsible for the change.
state_description.thresholds: Minimum score requirements for different supplier tiers (e.g., Platinum, Gold, Approved).
